## Meeting Purpose

[Explain and demonstrate GrowthX's content workflow process using a modified version of Jessalynn's existing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on editing the assignment brief (70% of effort) to prevent drift in later stages](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Apply detailed writing instructions/polishing guidelines early in the process](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Use feedback feature for specific edits after initial draft generation](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [New GrowthX platform in development to address Airtable Ops limitations](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

## Topics

### Workflow Overview and Structure

  - [Keyword should be directional (e.g. "modular vs monolithic AI native architecture")](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Key fields: company context, user context, CTA, writing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Check input mappings to ensure proper data flow between workflow steps](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Editing workflow structure: can add/remove columns, drag to reorder](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)

### Assignment Brief and Research

  - [Spend 10-15 minutes editing the brief for accuracy and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Research gen pulls from edited brief - only edit research if major issues](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Title gen is a standalone tool, currently a workflow quirk](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)

### Content Outline and Draft

  - [Edit outline to ensure solid structure (20% of effort)](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Initial draft often lacks formatting variety](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Apply writing instructions/polishing guidelines to improve structure](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Feedback and Final Edits

  - [Use feedback feature for specific edit instructions](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Can shorten by deleting entire sections rather than line editing](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Internal linking and final draft viewing added as workflow steps](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)

### Client-Specific Workflows

  - [Workflows vary between clients (e.g. Good Call's image generation)](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Writing instructions critical - 20+ detailed guidelines recommended](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to create documentation and recorded reference guide](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=2374.0)
  - [Matthew to share this meeting recording with Jessalynn](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=2388.0)
  - [Investigate options for adding comp article references to workflow](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
  - [Continue developing new GrowthX platform to replace Airtable Ops](https://fathom.video/share/8Gu-fZWChcX4kuNz3vKMywuVuZuryuNw?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
